creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 169344
Patch to update audio/chromaprint to 1.3.1

audio/chromaprint: Update to 1.3.1

This update also allows audio/chromaprint to build against ffmpeg 3.0.x. The ports tree currently still has multimedia/ffmepg at version 2.8.6, however this update is backwards compatible with ffmpeg 2.8.6. The update of multimedia/ffmpeg to 3.0.x branch is waiting for ports which depend on it to successfully build with the newer version of ffmpeg.
